plugins.name: Quick Transform
plugins.description: Reset position, rotation, or scale on selected nodes. Supports multi-selection and full undo.
plugins.author: TrashBash

plugins.name: Material Clipboard
plugins.description: Copy material properties from one material asset and paste them onto another. Paste is fully undoable.
plugins.author: TrashBash

plugins.name: Unused Asset Cleaner
plugins.description: Find and report unused assets in the project. Models, materials, and textures not referenced in the scene.
plugins.author: TrashBash
